title: Cookie Detection
click: Click to scan your browser for stored cookies.
name: Name
title3: What should I be aware of?
desc1: Cookies are small text files websites store on your device.
desc2: Cookies store your login data, shopping cart details or other preferences. That way you don't have to redo everything on each visit.
desc3: Cookies may be used to store information about your activity online, raising privacy concerns. Such data is commonly used for advertisement purposes.
desc4: It is recommended to only accept cookies that are required for website functionality because it enchances browsing experience. However, you should decline any marketing, statistics cookies if you are concerned about privacy.
areYouSure: Are you sure you want to clear data?
tryAgain: Refresh the page or try again later
